messages.content:
Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“Yes. Maybe some children, they have ability to think about something by themselves and they can make decisions on themselves but most of the time, I think most children are lack of thinning of the outside world. They lack of some critical thinking. they are not able to make decision by themselves. I think in most case, people uhh cannot make decision by themselves.”

"Yes, it's possible that some children have the ability to think independently and make their own decisions, but I believe that, more often than not, most children lack an understanding of the wider world and critical thinking skills, rendering them unable to make decisions on their own. In most cases, I think people struggle with making decisions independently."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“When people change their decisions is most likely they they think the other option in a person is also better. This situation is very very often when we are choosing many things and we will think the one is good and other is also good but we have to choose one, we only have to choose one not many. At this time, we will we will we maybe change our decision before we already choose an option.”

"People most likely change their decisions when they realize another option may also be better. This situation occurs frequently when we're faced with multiple choices; we might think one option is good, but realize another is equally appealing. However, since we must select only one, we may find ourselves changing our initial choice."
Come up with one sentence example for this and a conclusion for the above revised version.

Example: "When deciding between two job offers, both appearing equally beneficial, we might initially lean towards one but eventually switch to the other after careful consideration."

Conclusion: "Therefore, the process of making a choice often involves evaluating comparable alternatives, which can lead to a change in decision as we seek the option that best aligns with our preferences or needs at that moment."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“I'd like to share with you good website I had in ielts exam. it's called partner English. it's a great internet website, they offer speaking, reading, writing, and practice to support your IELTS exam. I often booked the class which is face-to-face practice on this platform and also I did vice versa sample exercise practice. I can do some reading practice or listening practice on this platform and after I do the practice, they have a very intelligent analyze system to help me find how I do some exercise wrong and how I can do it better. So, I think it's very useful to miss and I use it everyday. Although it is very good, but I also think it has many things to improve like dictation functions.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Describe something you do to help you study or work
You should say:

What it is

How you learn it

When you do it

And how you feel about the method”

"I'd like to share a valuable resource I discovered while preparing for my IELTS exam called Partner English. It's an excellent online platform offering a range of practice materials for speaking, reading, writing, and overall test preparation. I frequently scheduled face-to-face practice sessions through the site, which also allowed me to engage in various exercises for reading and listening practice. What sets this platform apart is its intelligent analysis system. After completing exercises, it provides insights into what I got wrong and offers guidance on improving my performance. I use this platform daily and find it incredibly beneficial for my study routine. While it has significantly aided my preparation, I believe there is still room for improvement, such as enhancing its dictation features. Overall, I feel very positive about this method as it has been instrumental in my learning process."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“At long term, I have goal is to get the IELTS exam for 6.5. I prepare for this IELTS exam from this year Jan. and I prepare for this IELTS exam for about 4 months. It's a bit little long but currently I even don't achieve this goal. I uhhh I uhh want to got this goal because my undergraduate university asked me I have to got this English standard. So, I very very very try to uh achieve this goal. Uhh, in order to achieve this goal, I actually try to many methods like to find organizations, find some teachers to taught me, find many websites to help me to enhance overall source. Yes, and it is very uhh very effective.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Describe a long-term goal you would like to achieve
You should say:

How long you have had this goal

What the goal is

How you will achieve it

And explain why you set this goal”

"My long-term goal is to achieve a score of 6.5 on the IELTS exam. I began preparing for this exam in January of this year and have dedicated about four months to studying so far. Although it might seem like a substantial period, I have yet to reach this target. My motivation for achieving this score is a requirement set by my undergraduate university, which mandates this English language standard for admission. Consequently, I've been extremely committed to meeting this goal. To accomplish this, I've explored various methods, including enrolling in courses offered by organizations, seeking instruction from qualified teachers, and utilizing numerous websites designed to enhance my proficiency in all aspects of the language. These efforts have been highly effective in improving my skills. Setting this goal was essential for me because it aligns with my academic aspirations and is a critical step in fulfilling my university's requirements."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“I think people always like to choose to do something when the deadline is very closing. In this way, they have to finish their tasks in a hurried I think people often do something before the deadline because when they have time, they think they have less amount of time to do this task so they not pass time, they think uhh they think if they have a much of time why who they talk later in their routine, so in most case, people will need to finish their task when the time is very closing to the deadline.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“On what occasions do people have to do things in a hurry?”

"I believe people tend to procrastinate and then choose to act as a deadline approaches, resulting in them having to complete their tasks in a rush. This often happens because, when they still have plenty of time, they underestimate the time required for the task, thinking they can afford to delay. Consequently, they end up using their time for other activities, only to find that they must hurry to meet the deadline as it looms closer. Therefore, it's common for individuals to find themselves in a rush to finish tasks, especially when they've allowed the deadline to dictate their schedule."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“I think people like to spend much time when they have meal, they must really enjoy the meal. They want to taste the meals uhhh very very slowly that they can uhh they can enjoy uh most stunning periods when when they are on the meal. And in other hands, uh having a meals uh slowly they can have them to have engage nutrition of the food better and it is in other aspect why people having a meal spend a lot of time.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Why do some people spend a long time having a meal?”

"I believe some people prefer to take their time when eating a meal because they genuinely want to savor and enjoy each bite. By eating slowly, they can relish the most enjoyable moments during their meal. On the other hand, consuming food at a leisurely pace allows for better absorption and engagement with the meal's nutritional benefits. This is another reason why individuals may spend a considerable amount of time dining."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“Based on my observations, most poeple believe that the subway is the most convenient transportation. the main reason is that we can use them to everywhere. As for me, I can use them to travel everywhere because it's very cheap. In conclusion, i think most people love using subway.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“What transportstion do you use the most?”

"From what I've observed, many people consider the subway to be the most convenient mode of transportation, primarily because it offers widespread accessibility. Personally, I find it incredibly practical for my daily travels due to its affordability. In conclusion, it seems that the subway is a popular choice among the majority for its ease of use and cost-effectiveness."
Make the following sentence simpler: "In conclusion, it seems that the subway is a popular choice among the majority for its ease of use and cost-effectiveness."
"In conclusion, the subway is popular because it's easy to use and affordable."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“Okay I want to describe a place which is a Central Park in My City I think it's this place I take so many photos on there and the actually last week I went to the Central Park and take us great pictures with my friends which have a last half beautiful place such as beautiful flowers and rivers and some Forest I think it's very beautiful and for and besides the Central Park will prepare a lot of interesting activities for the commercial and such as last year the Central Park invite a lot of famous and singer for a music festival and I went there with my friends and Jackson and we so last so a cake from our favorite band which called which Seven Stars and we take a lot of photo for the for the gig for the band and for another different interesting things so I think the central part is our is my favorite place for my city and I I usually take a lot of fun there because I think it's very interesting for myself”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Describe a place where you have taken photos more than once

You should say:

Where the place is

When you took the photos

What special features the photos taken there have

And explain why you have been there more than once to take photos”

"I'd like to talk about Central Park in my city, a place where I've taken numerous photos. Just last week, I visited the park and captured some wonderful pictures with my friends. This park is home to beautiful features such as vibrant flowers, serene rivers, and lush forests, making it a perfect backdrop for photography. In addition to its natural beauty, Central Park hosts numerous exciting events. For instance, last year, it organized a music festival featuring several famous singers. My friends and I attended to see our favorite band, Seven Stars, perform live. We took countless photos of the band and other interesting sights during the festival. The combination of stunning landscapes and unique activities makes Central Park my favorite spot in the city for photography. I find myself returning often, drawn by its beauty and the fun experiences it offers, making it an endlessly interesting place for me."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
"I really appreciate our city council build up for the citizen and I like have more activities in the central park. I hope I can bring my son or daughter to the central park with me in the future. I think it's very significant for my family memories it's a unique memory."

"I really appreciate the efforts of our city council in developing amenities for the citizens, and I enjoy the variety of activities available in Central Park. I hope to bring my son or daughter to Central Park in the future, as I believe creating memories there will be significant and unique for my family."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“Yes, definitely. I think the old people's life has improved a lot through the advancement of technology. Firstly, with the advancement of technology there are several electronic devices for example the smartphones and latiops could provide the opportunity for elders to talk about them and do not feel lonely. Furthermore, some medical health care could help them to cure.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Has old people’s life quality improved when compared to the past?”

"Yes, absolutely. The quality of life for elderly people has significantly improved thanks to technological advancements. For starters, the development of various electronic devices, such as smartphones and laptops, has made it easier for seniors to stay connected with others, significantly reducing feelings of loneliness. Moreover, advancements in medical healthcare have provided them with better treatment options, further enhancing their quality of life."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“In my opinions, one important advantage is that different people live in different house could help could could create more harmonious for people to live. It's like the elderly couldn't feel lonely and the children couldn't feel very warmly. For example, the children can play with the elderly and help with elderly.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“What are the advantages of having people of different ages living in the same house?”

"In my opinion, a significant advantage of having people of different ages living under the same roof is the creation of a more harmonious living environment. This arrangement ensures that the elderly do not feel isolated, while children experience a warmer, familial bond. For instance, children can interact and play with the elderly, fostering mutual assistance and understanding between generations."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“It depends on. It's mainly because it depends on several reasons. Sometimes, the older people possess have more experience and they could perform well in some situations because they face some difficulties because they have ever get through before so they have the ability to get through. On the other hand, some people have the ability.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Do you think old people can work better than young people?”

"It varies and primarily depends on several factors. Often, older individuals have more experience, enabling them to excel in certain situations due to having previously navigated similar challenges successfully. This experience equips them with the ability to overcome difficulties. On the other hand, younger individuals also possess unique capabilities."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“Hmm, in my opinion view, the most thing young people can learn is that they could learn some experience like the like the like the abilities to navigate some difficulties on some challenges. For example, grow things and has the abilities to deal with the abilities. And that time, the young can  use this lessons to solve the difficulties effectively.”

"In my view, one of the most valuable things young people can learn is how to gain experience in handling challenges and navigating difficulties. For instance, they can learn how to cultivate resilience and develop the ability to cope with various situations. With these lessons, they can then apply what they've learned to effectively overcome obstacles."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“I think there are several ways. Firstly, the youngsters can use easy language to communicate with the elders. Furthermorem the young can give them more time to understand the words. I think sometimes”

"I believe there are several effective approaches. Firstly, young people can use simple language to facilitate communication with older individuals. Furthermore, they can afford elders more time to process and understand the conversation. I think this is sometimes crucial."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below. Use a not only but also structure:
“There are numerous things for people to decide every day. For example, in the morning, people choose what to eat and to start their new day. Some of them take a cup of coffee and the other eat meal to recharge their batteries. On weekends, people also make decisions to what they want to do for relaxation. For example, going to a movie or hang out with friends would be a good choice.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“What decisions do people make every day?”

"People face numerous decisions daily, not only regarding how to kick-start their morning, choosing between having a cup of coffee or a meal to energize themselves, but also in deciding how to unwind on weekends, such as opting to watch a movie or hang out with friends."
Thank you. Now use an although structure.

"Although people make various decisions every day, from choosing what to eat in the morning to energize themselves with a cup of coffee or a meal, to deciding on weekend activities for relaxation like going to a movie or hanging out with friends."
It's incomplete. Complete the although structure

"Although people make various decisions every day, such as choosing what to eat in the morning to energize themselves with a cup of coffee or a meal, they also face choices on how to relax on weekends, whether it's going to a movie or hanging out with friends, indicating the continuous decision-making process in daily life."
Thank you. Now come up with either or structure.

"People encounter decisions daily, choosing either to start their day with a cup of coffee or a meal for energy, and on weekends, deciding either to unwind by going to a movie or hanging out with friends for relaxation."
Thank you. Now come up with neither nor structure.

"Every day, people face choices that are neither straightforward nor insignificant, from deciding neither to simply have a cup of coffee nor just a meal to start their day, to choosing neither to spend their weekends solely at home nor without some form of relaxation, like going to a movie or hanging out with friends."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“From my perspective, people who make decisions made them be better. Decisions are everywhere in our daily lives. If you make excellent decisions, you will be benefit from them, such as good plan for the future, or getting into a good university. And some small decisions also makes a difference such as clothing, a proper clothing make you confident everyday.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Why do people make decisions?”

"From my perspective, making decisions leads to improvement in people's lives. Decision-making is a constant part of our daily routine. Making wise choices can yield significant benefits, such as creating a solid plan for the future or securing admission to a reputable university. Even seemingly small decisions, like choosing what to wear, can make a substantial difference by boosting your confidence on a daily basis."
Thank you. Use the although structure in the revised version above.

"Although decision-making is an integral part of our daily lives, from my perspective, it is these choices that lead to improvements. Making wise choices can yield substantial benefits, such as formulating a solid plan for the future or gaining admission to a reputable university. Even seemingly minor decisions, like selecting what to wear, can make a significant difference by enhancing your confidence every day."
Thank you. Now use the not only but also structure.

"From my perspective, making decisions not only leads to significant improvements in people’s lives, such as formulating a solid future plan or gaining admission to a reputable university, but it also impacts smaller aspects, like choosing what to wear, which can boost confidence daily."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below:
“Well, for this question, I suppose it depends on the exact situation. For instance, some integral occasions like children's study career, their future ? couldn't be decided by their immature minds. They should more listen to their parents. But for some small circumstance like hang out with friends or choose what they want to do, they can decide by their own to decide their well-being.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Can children make decisions on their own?”

"For this question, I believe the answer varies depending on the situation. For significant moments, such as making choices about their education or future, children may not have the maturity to decide and should therefore heed their parents' advice. However, for less consequential decisions, such as socializing with friends or selecting hobbies, they are capable of making choices that contribute to their happiness."
Thank you. Come up with an idiom here and identify it.

"For this question, the answer isn't black and white; it depends on the situation. When it comes to big fish to fry, like education or future career paths, children might lack the necessary maturity and should lean on their parents' guidance. On the other hand, for smaller potatoes, like choosing how to spend free time or picking hobbies, they're fully capable of steering their own ship. **The idioms 'big fish to fry' and 'smaller potatoes' are used here to differentiate between more significant and less significant decisions, respectively."

Come up with a better sentence for clarity, accuracy, and the English grammar for sentence below. Use simple words:
“I want to share a special experience that I found a student ID card in the library.
Two years ago, when I went to the library and I to do my homework. At that time I found the next table there is an ID card on it. But no people.
I want to waiting for the moment if someone will return and find her or his ID card. But unlucky no one come here. So, so I need take action to help someone. Therefore, I hold some information on student online and give my phone number and information. Luckily, one hour later my phone rang I knew the owner I know I find the owner.
She very appreciates my behavior and I felt inspired because it's super simple and small act for me that I helped schoolmate. In the future, I hope I can help more people.”
Also make sure this response is relevant to these questions and topic below:
“Describe a time when you picked up an item that someone else lost
You should say:
What the item was
When and where you found it
What you did after finding it
And explain how you felt about the experience

"I want to share a time when I found a student ID card in the library. Two years ago, while I was there doing my homework, I noticed an ID card on the table next to me, but no one was around. I decided to wait for a bit, hoping someone would come back for it, but no one did. So, I took action to help out. I posted some information about the ID online and left my phone number. Luckily, an hour later, someone called me, and it turned out to be the owner of the ID. She was very thankful for what I did. I felt really good about it because it was a small, simple act on my part, but it made a difference to my fellow student. It has inspired me to help others more in the future."
Thank you. Come up with 2 idioms for this revised answer and identify them.

"I want to share a story about the time I found a needle in a haystack - a student ID card in the library. Two years ago, while poring over my homework in the library, I stumbled upon an ID card on the table next to me, but there was no sign of the owner. Deciding to not just sit on my hands, I waited a bit, hoping the owner would come looking for it, but no luck. Feeling the need to do something, I took to the internet to post about the found ID, including my contact details. Miraculously, within an hour, my phone rang, and I was able to reunite the ID with its grateful owner. She was over the moon, and I felt a warm glow of satisfaction. It was a small deed on my part but made a world of difference to her. This experience has encouraged me to keep an eye out for more opportunities to lend a helping hand."

Idioms used:
1. "A needle in a haystack" - Something very hard or impossible to find.
2. "Not just sit on my hands" - Not be passive; to take action.
